## Test plan
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (paste tail of output below if useful)
- [ ] Manually verified in Telegram (Mini App actually launches and the change behaves as expected)
- [ ] No new dependencies, OR new deps are pinned and justified in the description

## Security check
- [ ] No new endpoints exposed without auth
- [ ] No new env vars that default to dangerous values
- [ ] No new code paths that bypass the danger heuristic for auto-approve
- [ ] If the change touches `auth.js` or rate limiting, I read `docs/SECURITY.md`
